title: antidesma ferrugineum
intro: Antidesma ferrugineum, also known as the Ironwood or Ferrugineous Wood, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is also used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Antidesma ferrugineum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
